title: The No-Nonsense Guide to Admin Dashboards for Crypto Digital Stores — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: From zero to live crypto store in one afternoon. GitHub Pages hosting, Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, NOWPayments integration.

content.text: You're a digital creator in a restricted country, or you're tired of PayPal fees and KYC requirements. Setting up a digital store that accepts crypto payments and doesn't require you to create an account with a payment processor like Stripe or Payhip seems like an insurmountable task. But what if we told you that there's a straightforward way to build and manage a crypto-enabled digital store that's free from these restrictions? You can now sell your digital products worldwide without worrying about geo-restrictions, and we're going to show you exactly how to do it.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

The key to unlocking this method is to use a backend infrastructure that automates delivery, payment verification, and receipt generation. This means you don't need to integrate with multiple payment processors, deal with manual delivery, or handle complex order management. By leveraging a solution like Unchained Commerce's Core Shop Engine, you can bypass all these limitations and focus on what matters most: creating and selling your digital products. With automated delivery and payment verification, you can trust that customers will receive their products and pay for them as soon as the transaction is confirmed.
What You Need Before You Start

To set up your digital store, you'll need a few essential components. First, you'll need a backend infrastructure that can automate delivery and payment verification. This is where Unchained Commerce's Core Shop Engine comes in, which provides a seamless and automated experience for both you and your customers. Next, you'll need a payment processor that can handle crypto transactions. NOWPayments is a great option, as it supports over 300 coins and doesn't require KYC or buyer accounts. Finally, you'll need a frontend wallet integration to make it easy for customers to pay with their preferred coins.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

With your backend infrastructure, payment processor, and frontend wallet integration in place, it's time to set up your payment and delivery pipeline. This involves integrating your payment processor with your backend infrastructure and configuring automated delivery for your digital products. Unchained Commerce's Admin Dashboard makes it easy to manage orders, track payments, and monitor delivery status from anywhere in the world. With this setup, you can trust that every transaction is verified, every payment is secure, and every delivery is automated.
Unchained Commerce's Admin Dashboard provides real-time analytics to help you optimize your store's performance.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

Now that your payment and delivery pipeline is set up, it's time to go live and start selling your digital products. With Unchained Commerce's Shop Engine, you can create a fully functional digital store in minutes, complete with automated delivery and payment verification. You can customize your store's design, add products, and configure payment options to suit your needs. Once you're live, you can start promoting your store to attract customers and make your first sale.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

As your digital store grows and attracts more customers, you'll need to scale your backend infrastructure to handle increased traffic and transactions. Unchained Commerce's Admin Dashboard provides real-time analytics and order management tools to help you monitor and optimize your store's performance. With this information, you can make data-driven decisions to improve your store's efficiency, reduce costs, and increase revenue.
How do I build a digital store that accepts crypto payments?

How do I build a digital store that accepts crypto payments? To build a digital store that accepts crypto payments, you'll need a backend infrastructure that automates delivery and payment verification, a payment processor that can handle crypto transactions, and a frontend wallet integration to make it easy for customers to pay with their preferred coins. Unchained Commerce's Core Shop Engine and Admin Dashboard provide a seamless and automated experience for both you and your customers.
NOWPayments supports over 300 coins and doesn't require KYC or buyer accounts.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're looking for more information on how to set up a digital store that accepts crypto payments, check out Unchained Commerce's Shop Engine setup guide. You can also explore GitHub Pages as a static site host for your digital store, but keep in mind that you'll still need to integrate a payment processor like NOWPayments to accept crypto payments. For a more comprehensive solution, consider using Unchained Commerce's Admin Dashboard, which provides transaction logs, order management, and real-time analytics to help you monitor and optimize your store's performance.
Your Action Checklist

To set up your digital store, follow these steps: Create a digital product and list it on your store; Set up your payment processor with NOWPayments; Configure automated delivery with Unchained Commerce's Core Shop Engine; Integrate your frontend wallet with Web3 Wallet Connect; Customize your store's design and payment options; Go live and start promoting your store to attract customers.
Unchained Commerce's Shop Engine provides a seamless and automated experience for both you and your customers.
